title: Bulbostylis tisserantii
taxonomy: Bulbostylis tisserantii is classified as a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. This classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic traits. As a member of the Cyperaceae family, Bulbostylis tisserantii is closely related to other sedge species. The genus Bulbostylis is further classified under the family Cyperaceae, with the family itself belonging to the order Poales.
